chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-5631 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For haring of main case. 03.09.2025 ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 22.11.2023, which is almost 02 years ago. Since then, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of almost 02 years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
